final_reasoning: The image shows a street scene with distinct architectural and linguistic markers. The overall urban layout, the style of the buildings, and the specific appearance of the street signs and vehicles strongly point to Amman. Based on the visual cues and typical street layouts in the city, this is located in the Al-Abdali or Al-Shumaisani area of Amman.
